name: Pear & Fig Strudel
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the figs with pear juice and bring to a boil. Let simmer for 25 minutes.
2. Puree in a blender.
3. Peel and core the pears, then chop into bite-sized pieces.
4. Combine fig paste, pears, cinnamon, and allspice.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F.
6. Butter a 9" x 14" baking pan.
7. Layer 10 filo sheets, 2 at a time, brushing butter on every second sheet and sprinkling with breadcrumbs.
8. Spread pear filling evenly over the last sheet.
9. Cover with another 10 sheets of filo, layered as before with butter and breadcrumbs.
10. Score the top sheet into pieces about 3 inches square.
11. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, then allow to cool for 15 minutes.
12. Heat the honey until warm.
13. Drizzle over strudel and top with nuts.
14. Cut with a sharp knife.
